top_signals.title: A Truck Driver Made One Phone Call and Saved a Life. There Is an Award for That, and Nominations Close August 15.
top_signals.summary:
A driver rounds a curve on a dark rural road and sees a woman standing near the fog line, head shaved, wearing nothing but a beach towel, no other car or person anywhere in sight. Something is wrong. He acts. That woman turns out to be a human trafficking victim, and because a truck driver […]

The post A Truck Driver Made One Phone Call and Saved a Life. There Is an Award for That, and Nominations Close August 15. appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
